title: Jog's Spawn Eggs
description: Spawn Eggs that fit with the Texture Update!
body:
# Jog's Spawn Eggs will no longer support the latest versions of Minecraft
I plan to update Jog's Spawn Eggs to support all versions up to 1.21.4 in the near future. I imagine there will be little interest in using this Resource Pack past 1.21.4 as in Spring to Life drop all Spawn Eggs were given unique designs.

![Jog's Spawn Eggs: All Spawn Eggs Reimagined! Left out in the Texture Update, reimagined in this Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RQx68vCH/images/2758b7802c258b99b91812f3bdad1b3ae49e565a.png)
